notes: Pieces is now the sole memory backend. QuickCapture widget removed from home page. FullscreenCell Commit button removed. Settings stripped of density/frames/gestures/prediction/auto-commit/memory rows. Cache busters bumped to force browser refresh.
Phase 1 of bedrock repopulation — 10 voice profiles translated to people/*.json with kind:coworker
Phase 2 of bedrock repopulation — 28 client boxes translated to people/*.json with kind:lead. Full enrichment + lead sub-object + comms summary captured.

Phase 3 of bedrock repopulation — Hugo + Brenda&Steve get full graph workflows; every lead and coworker gets a dedicated agent_plan (the per-person sub-agent vision). 11 AUTO.* automations registered as triggers + hooks. Test stub triggers replaced with real ones.

Phase 4 — bedrock now feeds the chat system prompt as 'BEDROCK · STRUCTURED TRUTH'. mission_control_loader extended to pull workflows/triggers/agent_plans/hooks/catalog_edges into window.MissionControl. ai_instructions.personalBlock rewritten to inject full coworker voice profiles + full lead enrichment + automation summaries inline. Pieces stays separate under its own 'PIECES LTM · ambient context' label so the AI can reason about which source it's citing. Cache busters bumped (loader v=6, instructions v=10). Auto/ symlink added at project root pointing at /Users/jakeaaron/Desktop/Auto for read-only orchestrator passthrough.
Phase 5 of bedrock repopulation — top 30 venues by total deal value. Tiered: 10 tier_1 / 10 tier_2 / 10 tier_3. Cross-referenced Master Venue Index with Lead Venue Accounts (68) for Close enrichment.

Reports backend restored — /api/reports/* endpoints (list, create, get, ingest, ask, doc-delete, delete) reauthored after great-trim oversight. Storage: CCAgentindex/reports/<slug>/ with report.json + documents/ + conversation.jsonl. AI invocation reuses _intake_dispatch_chat (OpenAI primary, Claude Code fallback). Markdown rendering bug fixed: .ix-qa-text inherits white-space:pre-wrap which broke block-level markdown rendering once .md class was added — overridden to white-space:normal for .md.ix-qa-text. Markdown component hardened against marked v14 async path. Cache busters bumped: styles.css v75→v76, components.jsx v58→v59.

5th People dropdown entry wired. New components: VenuesScreen + VenueProfile in screens.jsx (venue-specific renderers — deal_stats tiles, raw_variants pills, tier badges, ENRICH-NOW chip, Close-account section, action bar). Route slug 'venues' added to KNOWN_SCREENS + route switch in app.jsx. Topbar accepts onOpenVenues; NavGroup gets 5th item with map-pin icon (added to lucide.js). mission_control_loader pulls fDomain('venues') into MissionControl.venues + venuesById + counts.venues. Cache busters bumped: styles 76→77, mission_control_loader 6→7, lucide 7→8, components 59→60, screens 66→67, app 47→48. CLAUDE.md §3.1 taxonomy table gets 5th row for kind:venue (note: venues live under venues/ not people/). page_asset_sitemap.md adds Venues page entry + Route Index updated.

Phase A — created intelligence/ skeleton with 24 leaf domains (READMEs + .gitkeep), wrote MANIFEST.md mapping all 24 scripts. Pilot: build_owner_stage_dashboards rewritten to read CCAgentindex/people/*.json (kind=lead) + run. Output landed at intelligence/sales/owner_stage/2026-04-27.md. 2583 bytes.

Phase B pilot — conversation intelligence rewritten + 30-day sweep + Analytics page wired with KPI tiles, sparkline, channel-mix bars, most-active-leads, full-narrative panel. Bedrock-fed (MissionControl.conversationIntelligence), AI-prompt-fed (BEDROCK STRUCTURED TRUTH section).
Source channel intelligence snapshot populated from 666 Close CRM opportunities (30-day window). 621 leads, 35 sources, 6 owners. Written by analytics_source_channels.py.

Seller performance + pipeline health sweep: 666 opps, 79 won, 273 active, pipeline $496.5k, won $241.2k, median close 27.3d, 6 owners, 27 pipeline stages. New script: Onboard Scripts/analytics_seller_performance.py (Close API, opportunity-first). UI: AnalyticsScreen stat strip +pipeline tile, +Pipeline Funnel tab, owners tab enriched with pipeline$/avg deal/median close/top stages. Bedrock registered: indexes/index.json analytics[]. Cache-bust: screens v70.

Upcoming events registry sweep: 4,569 opps / 4,198 leads / 409 upcoming events in 180d window. $737.8k booked, 25,696 total guests. June peak: 102 events $203k. 236 weddings, 27 graduations, 20 birthdays. New script: analytics_upcoming_events.py (Close API, 4 event custom fields). UI: AnalyticsScreen 6th stat tile, 6th tab (Upcoming Events) with monthly bars + type breakdown + full event timeline. Bedrock registered. Cache-bust: screens v71.

Win/loss conversion intelligence sweep: 4,569 opps, 553 won, 12.1% overall win rate, $1.4M won value, 10 conversion dimensions. Registered in indexes/index.json. Win/Loss tab added to AnalyticsScreen (screens.jsx v73), stat strip expanded to 7 tiles.

Revenue & growth intelligence sweep: 8,514 opps over 730d, 791 won, $1.7M total revenue, YoY +3.3%, median deal $2.0k, P75 $4.1k, top-20% deals = 52.4% of revenue. Revenue & Growth tab added to AnalyticsScreen (screens.jsx v74), stat strip expanded to 8 tiles with YoY growth indicator.

Added full analytics interactivity layer: AnalyticsContextMenu + AnalyticsToast components, right-click context menus on source bars/table rows/owner rows/event-type rows/guest-bucket rows/stage-of-death rows/revenue month bars, spotlight system (highlights one segment across all charts), ViewToggle (sources: chart|table, winloss: rates|counts, revenue: monthly|cumulative), clipboard copy with toast confirmation, Open in Close CRM action, cross-tab navigation from context menus, spotlight badge with dismiss X. Screens v74→v75.
Booking lead time sweep: 525 future bookings, median 51d, 38.3% last-minute. Fixed EVENT_DT_F field ID (was wrong in v1). Weddings median 168d, corporate 4d.
Cohort conversion analysis: 32 monthly cohorts, 4.9% avg 90d rate, 5.6% avg 1yr. expo_event 0% conversion (484 leads). Best: 2024-02 at 21.4% 90d.
Added Lead Time tab + Cohort Analysis tab + Auto-Insights panel to AnalyticsScreen. 10 tabs total. bookingLT + cohortData state + 7-fetch Promise.all. Cache-buster → v78.

Analytics styling overhaul: (1) Added AIcon component (inline SVG via window.icon design-deck system). (2) AnalyticsContextMenu + AnalyticsToast updated — font var(--mono)→var(--sans), icons render via AIcon instead of emoji characters. (3) Font fix: --mono: var(--font-body) override at analytics wrapper level so all UI labels use IBM Plex Sans site-wide. (4) All emoji icon: values replaced with design-deck icon names (eye/write/link/chart/diff/cal/fire/warn/clock/sparkles/wave/bolt). (5) Inline spotlight indicators {isSpot && 🔦} → AIcon eye. (6) Intel Signals ✦ header → AIcon sparkles. (7) Cohort Top-5 header 🏆 → AIcon sparkles. (8) Spotlight badge 🔦 → AIcon eye. (9) Urgency tile icons now render via AIcon. (10) Revenue insight uses revIcon name instead of dir arrow. (11) Context menus added to all 8 stat strip tiles (copy + go-to-tab). (12) Context menus added to compact All Sources list items. (13) Venue page 🔥 ENRICH NOW → text. Cache-bust: screens v84→v85.

notes: Two cleanups during Jake's session: (1) Renamed top-level Comeketo Agent/ to Aesthetic Asset Kit/ to disambiguate purpose (it's the visual design system, not the project itself). Pre-rename grep confirmed zero inbound code refs (only LEDGERS/ files referenced old path). Closes PROB-014. Auto/Comeketo Agent/ untouched. (2) Per Jake's pivot from heavyweight Auto/ migration to elegant symlink approach: created 6 relative symlinks under CCAgentindex/ pointing to ../Auto/<name>. Auto/ is itself a symlink to /Users/jakeaaron/Desktop/Auto/, so chain resolves transparently. Agent now finds Boxes (2 items), Client Boxes (28), comeketo-inbox (5), Onboard Scripts (24), orchestrator (11), Staff Boxes (10) under bedrock without anything physically moved. server.py AUTO_ROOT constants keep working. Active scheduled fires + seven-day cadence (Brenda Day 2 of 7) undisturbed. Reversible via unlink. Closes PROB-015 (originally deferred to Wednesday for heavyweight migration; symlink approach makes that unnecessary). Also corrected PROB-013: Auto/Onboard Scripts is canonical/working (translated from old app); top-level Onboard Scripts/ is legacy being slowly rewritten for analytics. Severity medium → low; status needs-decision → triaged. FDL §3, §4.2, §10 updated to reflect rename + corrected ownership + new bedrock aliases. OPL: PROB-014 + PROB-015 moved to Recently Closed; PROB-013 entry rewritten with corrected understanding. Working tree still uncommitted; awaiting Jake go-ahead. Jake hitting Max limit — wrapping up tight.
